metadata.description: Post-production plugins for Claude Cowork — DaVinci Resolve and Frame.io integrations

plugins.name: davinci-resolve
plugins.description: Control DaVinci Resolve from Cowork — execute API calls, create timelines, manage media, and render projects

plugins.name: frameio
plugins.description: Video review and collaboration with Frame.io — upload assets, manage reviews, collect feedback, and orchestrate approval workflows

plugins.name: resolvemanual
plugins.description: DaVinci Resolve assistant — helps you figure out how to do anything in Resolve using structured knowledge from the official manual
